reasoning: The market close price on 2025-11-09 (a Sunday) corresponds to the close on Friday, 2025-11-07, which was 217.41. AbbVie reported Q3 2025 earnings on October 31, where it beat adjusted EPS estimates and raised its full-year 2025 adjusted earnings guidance for the third time this year. Although GAAP earnings were impacted by acquisition-related items, the company also announced a 5.5% dividend increase starting in February 2026. Following an initial post-earnings dip to roughly 210, the stock has shown strong recovery momentum, rising to 217.41 by November 7 (four consecutive up days). No major binary drug trial results are scheduled for November 2025 (the next major Emraclidine update is expected in early 2026), suggesting the current recovery trend from adjusted guidance and sector-wide post-election clarity should support a moderate bullish bias in the short term. Probabilities are tapered toward 0.5 for later dates to account for the increased noise and uncertainty of longer horizons, including the Q4 earnings announcement in late January 2026.
